extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won from Alpecin-Fenix leadout after GROENEWEGEN Dylan hit barriers in final 200m, BENNETT Sam closed powerfully from poor position
tactical_patterns: Alpecin-Fenix successfully defended sprint train on arrow-straight 60km finishing stretch despite UAE aggressive positioning for ACKERMANN Pascal
BENNETT Sam demonstrated race-winning power closing from back of field, suggesting positioning not form limited result
STRAKHOV Dmitry milked breakaway for both intermediate sprint bonuses then abandoned companions via puncture, optimizing GC position
Gazprom deployed two riders (KOCHETKOV Pavel, STRAKHOV Dmitry) to control bonuses despite four-rider total squad at race

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: held sprint despite GROENEWEGEN Dylan on wheel, proving he can close even when marked by top finisher
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: extraordinary acceleration from terrible position suggests knee injury fully resolved, pure speed intact
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: hit barriers in sprint finale despite being on PHILIPSEN Jasper's wheel in winning position
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: UAE controlled positioning on 60km finishing straight but still finished behind five sprinters in home race
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: faded in finale despite being mentioned as favorite, positioning issues or declining acceleration
rider_signals.STRAKHOV Dmitry: neutral: tactical fake puncture after securing both intermediate sprint bonuses shows GC calculation over stage ambition
